description: DHS infographic in landscape format on a blue gradient background. A bold white centered title reads 'AI DEVELOPERS', with an italic white subtitle: 'Design, train, and enable critical infrastructure owners and operators to access AI models, supplying the intelligence to power software tools or applications.' A thin horizontal connector line with a small node leads down to three white framed illustration panels, each with a light-blue label tab: (1) 'Code', a desktop monitor screen filled with green binary digits (0s and 1s); (2) 'Machine Learning', a flat illustration of a node graph with a central gear-and-gauge icon suspended on lines; (3) 'Computing Power', a person seated at a multi-monitor workstation showing code brackets and cloud icons. A blue footer bar at the bottom carries white text: 'The new DHS Roles and Responsibilities Framework encourages developers to build AI with safety and ethics at the forefront, emphasizing privacy, fairness, and reliability.' The DHS seal sits at bottom-right. Flat vector illustration style.
notable_text: AI DEVELOPERS; Code; Machine Learning; Computing Power; The new DHS Roles and Responsibilities Framework encourages developers to build AI with safety and ethics at the forefront, emphasizing privacy, fairness, and reliability.
